title: ELA NÃO QUER QUE NINGUÉM A AJUDE
a: SHE DOESN’T WANT ANYBODY TO HELP HER
b: SHE DOESN’T WANT SOMEBODY TO HELP HER
c: SHE DOESN’T WANT NOBODY TO HELP HER
subtitle: QUAL A FRASE CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: SHE DOESN’T WANT ANYBODY TO HELP HER
translate: ELA NÃO QUER QUE NINGUÉM A AJUDE

title: EU NÃO CONHEÇO NINGUÉM NESTA EMPRESA
a: I DON’T KNOW NO ONE IN THIS COMPANY
b: I DON’T KNOW SOMEONE IN THIS COMPANY
c: I KNOW NO ONE IN THIS COMPANY
subtitle: QUAL A FRASE CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I KNOW NO ONE IN THIS COMPANY
translate: EU NÃO CONHEÇO NINGUÉM NESTA EMPRESA

title: ELA GOSTA DE TODO MUNDO. ELA É  MUITO GENTIL
a: SHE LIKES EVERYBODY. SHE IS VERY KIND
b: SHE LIKES ANYBODY. SHE IS VERY KIND
c: SHE LIKES SOMEBODY. SHE IS VERY KIND
subtitle: QUAL A FRASE CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: SHE LIKES EVERYBODY. SHE IS VERY KIND
a: SHE LIKES EVERYBODY SHE IS VERY KIND
translate: ELA GOSTA DE TODO MUNDO. ELA É  MUITO GENTIL

title: EU QUERIA USAR O TOALETE, MAS ALGUÉM ESTAVA LÁ DENTRO.
a: I WANTES TO USE THE TOILET, BUT EVERYONE WAS IN THERE
b: I WANTED TO USE THE TOILET, BUT SOMEONE WAS IN THERE
c: I WANTED TO USE THE TOILET, BUT ANYONE WAS IN THERE
subtitle: QUAL A FRASE CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I WANTED TO USE THE TOILET, BUT SOMEONE WAS IN THERE
a: I WANTED TO USE THE TOILET BUT SOMEONE WAS IN THERE
translate: EU QUERIA USAR O TOALETE, MAS ALGUÉM ESTAVA LÁ DENTRO.

title: EU NÃO CONSIGO ACHAR NINGUÉM PARA ME AJUDAR
a: I CAN’T FIND SOMEBODY TO HELP ME
b: I CAN’T FIND ANYBODY TO HELP ME
c: I CAN’T FIND NOBODY TO HELP ME

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I CAN’T FIND ANYBODY TO HELP ME
a: I CANT FIND ANYBODY TO HELP ME
translate: EU NÃO CONSIGO ACHAR NINGUÉM PARA ME AJUDAR

b: ANYBODY LIVES IN THAT HOUSE. IT’S EMPTY.

a: NOBODY LIVES IN THAT HOUSE IT’S EMPTY
b: NOBODY LIVES IN THAT HOUSE. ITS EMPTY
c: NOBODY LIVES IN THAT HOUSE ITS EMPTY

b: SOMEBODY KNOCKED ON THE DOOR EARLIER I DONT KNOW WHO IT WAS
